headline: Pfizer (PFE) Names Cecile Guegan Interim CFO As Dave Denton Prepares To Exit
summary: Pfizer announced that Chief Financial Officer Dave Denton will leave the company in August to pursue an external opportunity. Senior Vice President Cecile Guegan has been appointed Interim CFO, effective upon Denton’s departure. The change affects Pfizer’s top financial leadership at a time when the company is focused on major pipeline investments and internal changes. headline: Pfizer Announces Chief Financial Officer Transition
summary: NEW YORK, June 18, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced that Dave Denton, Chief Financial Officer, will step down from his current role and leave the company on August 15 for a professional opportunity outside of the pharmaceutical industry in consumer goods, which he has accepted.
